name: Darryl Apollo
description: Apollo.io enrichment for P&C executive leads — email + phone with hybrid sync/async

asyncPhoneMonthlyLimit.description: Max async phone hunts per month (default 50)

webhookBaseUrl.description: Base URL for webhook callbacks (e.g. https://openclaw-darryl.onrender.com)

webhookSecret.description: Secret token for webhook URL path

hooksToken.description: Gateway hooks token for agent dispatch

dataDir.description: Directory for Apollo usage SQLite database

leadsDbPath.description: Path to the leads SQLite database (for webhook cross-DB writes)
